finding_results.notes: The Ilsan disclosure now triggers an on-page, confirmed loss (seized ledger strips and choir payout records) and immediate embodied consequence for Ina (self-injury from tremor control). The post-disclosure hold is also anchored with concrete timestamps instead of abstract time blur.
finding_results.summary: Surrender aftermath now lands with specific operational damage and bodily/moral cost in-room.

finding_results.notes: The hymnbook code is no longer instantly actionable: the critical opening line is partially missing, and the keyed locker system hard-locks and summons security after failed entries. Ina must now recover the missing line in person while evading an active tail, creating immediate operational risk before plan stabilization.
finding_results.summary: Recovery turn is now structurally costly, with a concrete obstacle and immediate downside risk.

summary: Both packet findings were addressed with targeted structural/craft revisions: the capitulation hinge now shows explicit confirmed loss plus embodied consequence, and the dead-drop pathway now carries a code-linked obstacle with immediate surveillance and lockout risk.
